test_results.scope: scoped to Issue #690 related test files

broader_run.regression_check: No new failures introduced. The 45 pre-existing failures (e.g., db-migrations-v10, api-clone, status-detector) all reproduce on the unchanged main branch and are unrelated to Issue #690.

commits: 0469b37e: feat(#690): add repository visibility toggle for sidebar control

phases.red: New failing tests authored for migration v31, repository visibility API, RepositoryList toggle UI, and Sidebar filter.
phases.green: Implemented migration v31, db-repository visible field, getRepositories visible/enabled, API GET/PUT visible, cache/context propagation, RepositoryList Visibility column with optimistic update, and Sidebar local filter.
phases.refactor: Subcomponent VisibilityToggle extracted with role="switch" + aria-checked accessibility. Type alias UpdateRepositoryResponse added for clarity. JSDoc explicitly notes enabled vs visible independence.

notes: All 13 acceptance criteria are covered with new tests and pre-existing tests still pass. enabled and visible flags are kept strictly independent at the DB layer (disableRepository/restoreRepository never touch visible) and at the UI layer (the Visibility toggle never touches enabled). The Sidebar filter is implemented as a Sidebar-local filter rather than modifying useWorktreeList so that Sessions and Review screens continue to render every worktree (per AC10). Coverage was not measured as a single percentage because vitest --coverage with focused test files reports a misleading whole-codebase percentage; instead, all new code paths have direct unit-test coverage (DB migration up/down, CRUD with new column, API success/error/independence, UI optimistic update + rollback + pending-state lock, sidebar filtering for the four enabled×visible combinations).
